customerName.title: Customer Name
customerName.description: Full name of the customer. The customer's full name as they provided it

dealershipId.title: Dealership Id
dealershipId.description: Salesforce ID of the assigned dealership. The Salesforce ID returned by "Find Nearest Dealership". Do not ask the customer for this.

email.title: Email
email.description: Customer email address. The customer's email address. Confirm it is a valid email format.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: Customer phone number. The customer's email address. Confirm it is a valid email format.

preferredDate.title: Preferred Date
preferredDate.description: Preferred test drive date.Use the confirmed available date from "Check Slot Availability".

vehicleModelName.title: Vehicle Model Name
vehicleModelName.description: Name of the selected vehicle model. The exact name of the vehicle model the customer selected. Must match a model from the "Get Vehicle Models" list exactly.

zipCode.title: Zip Code
zipCode.description: Customer zip code. The customer's 6-digit zipcode provided earlier.
